allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('peerDeps:', d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('expo-constants dep:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('expo-constants','not found'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('expo-constants version:', d['version']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('5.'\) or v.startswith\('6.'\)][-10:]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('dependencies', {}\).get\('react-native-screens', 'not found'\)\); print\(d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\).get\('react-native-screens', 'not found'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('rns peer:', d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\).get\('react-native-screens', 'not found'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; data = sys.stdin.read\(\); import re; m = re.search\(r'react-native-screens[^,\\n]*', data\); print\(m.group\(\) if m else 'not found'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs = {**d.get\('dependencies', {}\), **d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\)}; [print\(k, v\) for k,v in pkgs.items\(\) if 'screen' in k.lower\(\) or 'navigation' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'screen' in k.lower\(\)}\)")
